name: CycloClean
description: Cycloclean is a bicycle-driven water purifying case that attaches to the rear seat of a bicycle.

taxonomy.sub_category: CycloClean Updated on December 27, 2023 · Created on August 27, 2015 CycloClean Cycloclean is a bicycle-driven water purifying case that attaches to the rear seat of a bicycle. Developed By Nippon Basic Co. Ltd. Tested By Florida International University Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description CycloClean is a point-of-use, bicycle-driven water purification system that is comprised of four filters attached to the rear seat of the bicycle. The product was developed by Nippon Basic Co. Ltd. Water is pumped via pedal action, from the source through a series of filters to output clean water. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy Market Suggested Retail Price $6,600.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises Distributors / Implementing Organizations The product is distributed by the manufacturer, Nippon Basic Co. Ltd. Countries Bangladesh, Burma, India, Japan, Thailand Manufacturing/Building Method The product is manufactured in Bangladesh. However, it's two main components pumps and filters are imported from Japan. Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model Users can obtain the product by contacting the manufacturer directly. Distributions to Date Status As of November 2014, 200 units have been distributed. Target use case Household use Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 300 L/hr Bacteria reduction Unknown Type of membrane filtration Microfiltration Virus reduction Unknown Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Material of construction Microfiltation membrane, carbon filter, bicycle components Safe water storage capacity (L) None Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) Unknown Design Specifications CycloClean bicycle is comprised of a bicycle that doubles as transportation and water purification. The purification system is made of four filters, a pre-filter and three filters to purify water for drinking - 1 microfiltration membrane filter, 1 hybrid carbon filter, and 1 primary filter. Cycloclean filters dirt, bacteria, and smell from the raw water (rainwater, river, or lake). The system can purify 5 L of raw water in one minute. Product Schematics Technical Support Technical support is provided by Nippon Basic Co. Ltd. Replacement Components Parts are not sold separately. Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters CycloClean can produce 5-6 liters of drinking water per minute. Vetted Performance Status UNIDO states that a unit of this technology can produce 5 liters of clean drinking water per minute from raw water, however, there was no evaluation of microorganism reduction. Safety Seawater is not appropriate to be used as a water supply. Complementary Technical Systems Clean water storage container and supply of untreated water. Academic Research and References Gonzales, B., et al., 2014, Bicycle Powered Water Filtration Systems, BSc. Thesis, Florida International University “Water treatment: Bicycle-powered water purifying equipment,” United Nations Industrial Development Organization.
